title: LAR-1 Semantic Overlay
description: JSON Schema for Content-Type: application/lar+json. LAR-1 adds temporal, spatial, cognitive, evidential, confidence, and verification dimensions to agent messages.

lar1Fields.description: Semantic overlay fields. All fields are optional; agents may send a subset (progressive disclosure).

T.description: Temporal frame — when the content applies.

S.description: Spatial / contextual frame — where the content is situated.

C.description: Cognitive stance — what kind of mental move this message represents.

E.description: Evidential grounding — how the claim is supported.

V.description: Verification status for the confidence and evidence claims.

x-lar1-compact-format.summary: Human-readable inline representation prefixed with LAR:

grammar.KEY: One of: T | S | C | E | L | V (case-sensitive, uppercase)
grammar.VALUE: enum literal for T,S,C,E,V | decimal for L (0..1 inclusive)
grammar.separator: Comma between pairs; no spaces required but allowed after commas
grammar.order: Pairs may appear in any order; duplicate keys are invalid (last wins is NOT defined — parsers MUST reject duplicates)
grammar.empty: Empty string or LAR: alone is invalid (at least one pair required)

mappingToJson.description: Each KEY=VALUE pair maps to the same key inside the LAR-1 object. L is parsed as JSON number.
mappingToJson.envelope: Compact format represents the inner object only; serializers wrap as { "LAR-1": { ... } } for application/lar+json
